commands.review_summary:
This PR factors the OpenAI Realtime browser SDP answer reader into an injected helper, rejects unsafe digit-only Content-Length values before reading the stream, and adds a focused dev-tooling safety regression test.

PR surface: Tests +24, Other +29. Total +53 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main's browser-local SDP reader only rejects safe integer Content-Length values greater than the cap, so an unsafe digit-only value can reach body.getReader. I did not run Vitest or live smoke in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Manual review is needed because the PR is draft and protected by the maintainer label, with validation choice remaining rather than a narrow automated repair.
